name: Zero Risk — Content Repurposing 1→N (Webhook or Cron)

parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || '' }}",
  "query": "Brand voice, tone per platform, content style, key messages, repurposing performance",
  "k": 20,
  "pillar_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.pillar_id || '' }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id || '' }}"
}

={
  "agent": "content-creator",
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "task": {{ JSON.stringify('Repurpose pillar content into ' + (($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platforms || []).length) + ' platform-specific formats: ' + ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platforms || []).join(', ') + '. Each variant adapts tone to platform while preserving core message. Output JSON with platform-keyed variants object.') }},
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || '' }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id || '' }}",
  "pillar_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.pillar_id || '' }}",
  "platforms": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platforms ?? []) }},
  "workflow_id": "{{ $workflow.id }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}",
  "context": { "smoke_test": {{ ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || "").startsWith("smoke-") }} },
  "extra": { "pillar": {{ JSON.stringify($('Fetch: Pillar Content').item.json ?? {}) }}, "brand_context": {{ JSON.stringify($('Client Brain: Style Guide').item.json ?? {}) }}, "brief": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json ?? {}) }} }
}

={
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || '' }}",
  "source_pillar_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.pillar_id || '' }}",
  "repurposing_task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id || '' }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id || '' }}",
  "variants": {{ JSON.stringify($('Agent: Content Creator (Repurpose)').item.json.variants || {}) }},
  "queue_status": "awaiting_approval",
  "auto_publish": {{ Boolean($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.auto_publish) }},
  "platforms": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platforms ?? []) }},
  "pillar_type": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.pillar_type || '' }}",
  "created_at": "{{ new Date().toISOString() }}"
}

={
  "agent": "growth-hacker",
  "model": "claude-sonnet-4-6",
  "task": {{ JSON.stringify('Publish repurposed content via GHL Social + Metricool. Target platforms: ' + (($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platforms || []).join(', '))) }},
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || '' }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id || '' }}",
  "workflow_id": "{{ $workflow.id }}",
  "workflow_execution_id": "{{ $execution.id }}",
  "context": { "smoke_test": {{ ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || "").startsWith("smoke-") }} },
  "extra": { "variants": {{ JSON.stringify($('Agent: Content Creator (Repurpose)').item.json.variants || {}) }}, "auto_schedule": true, "brief": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json ?? {}) }} }
}

={
  "task_type": "content_repurposing",
  "agent_slug": "content-creator",
  "client_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.client_id || '' }}",
  "task_id": "{{ $('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.task_id || '' }}",
  "task_input": {{ JSON.stringify('pillar_id=' + ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.pillar_id || '') + ' type=' + ($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.pillar_type || '')) }},
  "output_summary": {{ JSON.stringify('Repurposed into ' + ((Object.keys($('Agent: Content Creator (Repurpose)').item.json.variants || {})).length) + ' variants across ' + (($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platforms || []).length) + ' platforms') }},
  "success": true,
  "duration_ms": 0,
  "cost_usd": 0,
  "platforms": {{ JSON.stringify($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.platforms ?? []) }},
  "auto_publish": {{ Boolean($('Code: Validate Brief').item.json.auto_publish) }}
}

parameters.jsCode: return [{ json: { message: 'Auto-publish disabled. Content queued for manual approval.' } }];
